title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
